batch_zero_plan.description: Batch-zero macro translation sequence. Rule: translate tier 0 (any order), then tier 1, then tier 2 — all before model batch 1.
batch_zero_plan.manual_edges_note: List any dependency edges added manually because schema-qualified UDF calls are invisible to the scan, or state 'none'.
batch_zero_plan._macros_note: Illustrative entries only. Real output contains one entry per catalogued NEEDS macro: action 'translate' entries carry a non-null tier; 'redesign' and 'manual-review-out-of-scope' entries carry a null tier. model_reach is the count of models using the macro directly or transitively — a floor for UDF-layer macros.
